name: Pasta W/Pesto Sauce and Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the pesto sauce by pureeing pine nuts, garlic, basil, 1 tablespoon olive oil, salt, and pepper in a food processor.
2. Prepare the bechamel sauce: In a separate pan, melt 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat. Add flour and stir until smooth. Gradually whisk in skim milk, stirring constantly to avoid lumps. Season with salt and pepper. Cook until thickened.
3. Drain and chop the sun-dried tomatoes, then add them to the hot water to soften.
4. In a large bowl, toss cooked pasta with the bechamel sauce. Add pesto sauce, chopped sun-dried tomatoes, and toasted breadcrumbs for additional texture.
